mapper.select: SELECT a.*, b.name AS dept_name, c.name AS inst_name, c.inst_no, m.perms AS default_menu FROM sys_user_admin a LEFT JOIN sys_inst c ON a.inst_id = c.inst_id AND c.newlevel = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_dept b ON a.dept_id = b.dept_id AND b.newlevel = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_menu_default md ON a.user_id = md.user_id AND md.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_menu m ON m.menu_id = md.menu_id AND m.is_deleted = 0 WHERE 1 = 1 AND a.is_deleted = 0 AND a.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT a.*, b.name AS dept_name, c.name AS inst_name FROM sys_user_admin a LEFT JOIN sys_dept b ON a.dept_id = b.dept_id LEFT JOIN sys_inst c ON a.inst_id = c.inst_id WHERE a.name LIKE CONCAT('%', CONCAT(#{thinkString}, '%')) OR a.login_name LIKE CONCAT('%', CONCAT(#{thinkString}, '%')) OR a.user_id LIKE CONCAT('%', CONCAT(#{thinkString}, '%'))
